criteria.reasoning: s.lower().strip() correctly lowercases and strips whitespace.
The regex [^a-z0-9]+ replaces runs of non-alphanumerics with single hyphen, and the second sub collapses any remaining consecutive hyphens.
s.strip('-') removes leading and trailing hyphens.
All-symbol input becomes '-' then stripped to '', empty input stays ''; no errors.
All four examples produce correct outputs: hello-world, trailing-spaces, c-rust, and ''.

summary: The implementation correctly and completely satisfies all six spec rules and produces all documented example outputs.
